given: discovery and view CUs enabled by nano defaults
custom profile may disable one dedicated CU
when: client invokes discovery and view service requests
then: responses match cited OPC UA sections
optional CUs remain unclaimed by nano defaults
a disabled dedicated CU does not disable unrelated enabled behavior

scenarios.source: spec.md US2, CASE-003, CASE-004, CASE-007, CASE-009
given: micro or higher profile enables write/session CUs
when: client writes values or changes session user
then: invalid or disabled requests return explicit StatusCodes
disabled behavior preserves prior value, identity, and nonce state
IndexRange remains unsupported and unclaimed under S071-D1

given: diagnostics CUs enabled or disabled by profile gate
when: client reads diagnostics nodes or requests returnDiagnostics
then: each disabled dedicated diagnostics behavior is unavailable and not claimed without disabling the other diagnostics CU

given: in-scope service receives malformed or boundary request
then: cited OPC UA failure StatusCode is returned
